columns.name: TimeGenerated
columns.description: The timestamp (in UTC) when the log entry was generated.

columns.name: AuditId
columns.description: Unique identifier for the audit log entry.

columns.name: Severity
columns.description: Severity level of the audit event (e.g., Notice, Warning).

columns.name: CreatedAt
columns.description: Timestamp when the audit log was created.

columns.name: CreatedBy
columns.description: User email who performed the action.

columns.name: Module
columns.description: Module or service that generated the log (e.g., CLOUDINFRA).

columns.name: Category
columns.description: Category of the audit event (e.g., Authentication, Configuration).
